name: Frozen Jack-o-Lanterns
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off tops of oranges.
2. Gently hollow out pulp (reserve for another use), leaving a thick shell; hollow out pulp from the tops also.
3. Carve Jack-O-Lantern faces into each orange.
4. Pack chocolate ice cream into shells, ensuring it doesn't escape through the holes.
5. Cut a hole in the top of each orange.
6. Place the tops back on, over the ice cream, and insert a cinnamon stick stem through the hole.
7. Place in freezer for at least 3 hours, or until serving time.
